art_market.summary: Global art market sales reached $59.6 billion in 2025, marking 4% growth. 2026 outlook is cautiously optimistic with a shift towards 'human-hand' craftsmanship.
top_stories: Art Basel UBS Report 2026 confirms 4% YoY growth in 2025.
Collectors favoring high-value, historically enduring works over speculative assets.
Christie's Asian Art Week and Sotheby's New York March sales highlight current activity.

stock_market.summary: Global stocks showing mixed reactions amid US-Iran negotiation uncertainties; US futures dip on March 27.
key_factors: President Trump extends deadline for US-Iran deal, fueling uncertainty.
URSB Bancorp IPO debuts on OTCQB.
